html:
“Turns crafted items and structures into their ingredient parts based on their remaining durability.

Gem ingredients are not returned.”

-

The Deconstruction Staff is a craftable Item found in the Ancient Pseudoscience Filter. It requires at least a Broken Pseudoscience Station to craft, and costs 4 Nightmare Fuel, 2 Living Logs, and 2 Green Gems to craft. It also can randomly drop from an Ancient Pseudoscience Station when destroyed. Deconstruction Staffs cannot be prototyped and can only be crafted within range of an Ancient Pseudoscience Station.

When used on a craftable Structure, the Deconstruction Staff returns 100% of the ingredients needed to craft it. However, when used on an Item, the Staff will return a percentage of the materials equal to the remaining durability, rounded up. If Gems were used in the crafting process, they will not be returned and will always "shatter" instead. With each use of the Staff, Characters will lose 20 and the Staff will lose 20% of its Durability.

Contents

  • 1 Deconstructing Craftables
    • 1.1 Craftables Created with a Construction Amulet
      • 1.1.1 Explanation
      • 1.1.2 Items Made From Living Mobs
    • 1.2 Craftables Created without a Construction Amulet
    • 1.3 Deconstruction to renew durability
  • 2 Deconstructing Non-craftables
  • 3 Skins
  • 4 Tips
  • 5 Assets
  • 6 Gallery

Deconstructing Craftables

Craftables Created with a Construction Amulet

Any craftable object can be deconstructed, but most are not worth the cost (thulecite is rare, green gems are rarer). The following table lists some commonly deconstructed items. It assumes the item was crafted with a Construction Amulet and shows net cost of the construction and deconstruction and net gain. Items produced without a construction amulet are covered in separate tables below.

Item Construction Cost using Deconstruction Yield Net Cost Net Gain
Thulecite Suit ×0.2 ×3.4 ×2.6 ×6 ×4 ×0.44 ×0.2 ×2.52 ×0.88
Thulecite Club ×0.2 ×2.4 ×2 ×2.6 ×4 ×3 ×4 ×0.44 ×1.52 ×0.8 ×0.88
Glossamer Saddle ×0.2 ×0.4 ×1 ×0.6 ×2 ×34 ×2 ×4 ×68 ×0.44 ×0.48 ×1.12 ×0.8 ×2 + ×34
War Saddle ×2 ×0.2 ×0.4 ×2 ×0.6 ×5 ×4 ×4 ×10 ×0.44 ×0.48 ×0.2 ×1.12 ×2 ×2 ×5

Explanation

Assuming the construction amulet was used to craft the staff, the effective cost of the staff is ×1.2 ×0.4 ×1 ×2.6. The staff can be used 5 times, so dividing the cost by 5 yields the cost per use: ×0.24 ×0.08 ×0.2 ×0.52

The best candidates for construction/deconstruction are items that use (even) multiples of a rare ingredient and no gems (except the Iridescent Gem - all other gems are destroyed during deconstruction).

Items Made From Living Mobs

When deconstructing items produced with living mobs, you may wish to be prepared to catch those animals again once they are freed. This is particularly problematic with mobs like multiple bees or rabbits that require tools and hunting/trapping to catch.

Craftables Created without a Construction Amulet

Hammering Thulecite Walls is the best way to convert Thulecite to fragments. Thulecite Wall deconstruction is a waste compared with deconstructing Thulecite Suits.

Scaled Flooring is worth deconstructing even when produced without the construction amulet (scales are probably rarer than green gems).

Item Construction Cost Deconstruction Yield Net Cost Net Gain
Scaled Flooring ×0.25 ×0.25 ×1 ×1 ×0.24 ×0.08 ×0.2 ×0.52 ×0.75 ×0.75
Thulecite Wall ×0.167 ×1 ×0.24 ×0.2 ×0.52 ×0.753

Other Turfs (whether crafted or dug up) might be deconstructed to yield interesting ingredients.

Deconstruction to renew durability

When using deconstruction to renew durability, the profit is the extended use of the item and/or components, not (only) a resource that can be used to create other items. A player could deconstruct a heavily used Pick/Axe, to yield a brand new Opulent Pickaxe, Luxury Axe, and 1 thulecite, which can then be used down to 3% durability before constructing a new Pick/Axe with them.

Similarly, if you're going to want more Scalemail, deconstructing it directly is more efficient than the 0.75 scales created when deconstructing Scaled Floring, but deconstructing flooring produces multiplies scales that can then be used for any purpose.

Item Construction Cost Deconstruction Yield Net Cost Net Gain
Pick/Axe ×2 ×1 ×1 ×1 ×1 ×1 ×0.24 ×0.2 ×0.52 ×0.92 ×1 ×1 Use of item and components
Scalemail ×1 ×1 ×3 ×1 ×1 ×1 ×0.24 ×0.08 ×0.2 ×0.52 ×2 ×1 ×1 ×1 Use of item and components

Deconstructing Non-craftables

The following non-craftable items can be deconstructed to yield:

Item Drops
×4 ×2 ×3 ×4
×1 ×4 ×2
×5
×4 ×10
×6 ×10
×6 ×2 ×1
×4 ×2 ×1
×3 ×2
×2 ×3
×2 ×1
×3 ×2
×1 ×1
×4 ×4
×4 ×4
×5
x3 x2
×2 ×1 ×1
x3

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Clockwork Deconstruction Staff skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
  • The Loyal The Nouveau Deconstructor skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from March 16 to March 30, 2023.
  • The Loyal Global Deconstruction Staff skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from Sep 18, 2025 to Oct 16 , 2025.
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Carrat Collection
Clockwork Deconstruction Staff
A construct of deconstruction.
See ingame
Loyal
Art Nouveau Collection
Nouveau Deconstructor
Artfully break down old concepts to create something new.
Loyal
Orbital Collection
Global Deconstruction Staff
A tool of mass deconstruction.

Tips

  • Since Green Gems are so rare, the best use for Deconstruction Staffs is on Items or Structures that require very rare or non-renewable materials.
  • Some items that are created using a single non-renewable or rare ingredient (e.g. Pan Flute) can be deconstructed and crafted again to extend their usage, since the Staff will always return at least one of the non-gem materials used.
  • Using the Deconstruction Staff on a single item from a recipe that gives multiple copies of said item (e.g. Turfs or Walls) will return the main item + part of the recipe. For example, deconstructing 1 Scaled Flooring will return 1 Scales and 1 Cut Stone.

Assets

Deconstruction StaffGlobal Deconstruction Staff

  • Dropped

  • Dropped
  • Equipped

Gallery

  • Wolfgang holding the Deconstruction Staff.
  • Wolfgang using the Deconstruction Staff on a Meat Effigy.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Gậy Giải Cấu Trúc là một Vật Phẩm có thể chế tạo được tìm thấy trong Bộ Lọc Giả Khoa Học Cổ Đại. Nó cần ít nhất một Trạm giả khoa học bị hỏng để chế tạo và tốn 4 Nhiên liệu ác mộng, 2 Gỗ sống và 2 Ngọc xanh để chế tạo. Nó cũng có thể rơi ngẫu nhiên từ Trạm Giả Khoa Cổ Đại khi bị phá hủy. Gậy Giải Cấu Trúc không thể được tạo nguyên mẫu và chỉ có thể được chế tạo trong phạm vi của Trạm Giả Khoa Học Cổ Đại.

Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Staffs Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Clockwork Deconstruction Staff''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Carrat]] event in 2020. * The '''Loyal The Nouveau Deconstructor''' skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from March 16 to March 30, 2023. * The '''Loyal Global Deconstruction Staff''' skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from Sep 18, 2025 to Oct 16 , 2025.
{{SkinInfo |image = Clockwork Deconstruction Staff Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Year of the Carrat Collection |name = Clockwork Deconstruction Staff |description = A construct of deconstruction. |ingame = Clockwork Deconstruction Staff Wilson.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = The Nouveau Deconstructor Icon.png |rarity = Loyal |collection = Art Nouveau Collection |name = Nouveau Deconstructor |description = Artfully break down old concepts to create something new. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Global Deconstruction Staff Icon.png |rarity = Loyal |collection = Orbital Collection |name = Global Deconstruction Staff |description = A tool of mass deconstruction. }}
== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * Since Green Gems are so rare, the best use for Deconstruction Staffs is on Items or Structures that require very rare or non-renewable materials. * Some items that are created using a single non-renewable or rare ingredient (e.g. [[Pan Flute]]) can be deconstructed and crafted again to extend their usage, since the Staff will always return at least one of the non-gem materials used. * Using the Deconstruction Staff on a single item from a recipe that gives multiple copies of said item (e.g. [[Turfs]] or [[Wall]]s) will return the main item + part of the recipe. For example, deconstructing 1 [[Scaled Flooring]] will return 1 [[Scales]] and 1 [[Cut Stone]]. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Deconstruction Staff= Deconstruction Staff Dropped.png|Dropped |-| Global Deconstruction Staff= Global Deconstruction Staff Dropped.png|Dropped Global Deconstruction Staff Equipped.png|Equipped == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Green Staff.jpg|[[Wolfgang]] holding the Deconstruction Staff.
